---
title: "Projects"
---

This portfolio connects my mathematical training with applied work in time series, econometrics, causal inference, machine learning, and quantitative finance.

Each project includes code, documentation, and a short explanation of the modeling problem, methodology, and results.

## Featured Portfolio

### Time Series Portfolio

A unified collection of applied time series projects covering Bayesian modeling, forecasting, dynamic regression, vector autoregressions, and macroeconomic applications.

**Repository:** [Time-Series](https://github.com/jsjaramillod/Time-Series)

Planned modules:

- Project 01: Bayesian Modeling for Binary Time Series  
- Project 02: Forecasting and Dynamic Time Series Models  
- Project 03: Vector Autoregressions and Impulse Responses  
- Project 04: Bayesian VARs and Macroeconomic Applications  

---

### Econometrics and Causal Inference

Applied projects involving regression, instrumental variables, regression discontinuity, matching, bootstrap inference, and causal interpretation.

Topics include:

- Fuzzy regression discontinuity  
- Treatment effect estimation  
- Bootstrap uncertainty  
- Propensity score methods  
- Bayesian causal forests  

---

### Quantitative Finance

Projects connecting stochastic modeling, time series, and financial applications.

Topics include:

- Portfolio construction  
- Hedging strategies  
- Volatility modeling  
- Risk analysis  
- Forecasting financial time series  

---

### Machine Learning

Machine learning and deep learning projects with emphasis on mathematical modeling, uncertainty, and applied prediction.

Topics include:

- Predictive modeling  
- Model evaluation  
- Computer vision  
- Deep learning  
- Uncertainty quantification
